codeReview.summary: Feature requirements are not fully met in the reviewed worker output: runtime backfill execution is not wired into production ingestion paths, and the handoff commit points to an unrelated dashboard-switcher test-target change instead of this feature’s implementation.

issues.description: BackfillCursorStore is only constructed and exposed on DataStore, but there are no production call sites invoking nextBackfillWindow/advanceCursor (repo-wide search shows usage only in BackfillSchedulerTests). This means no actual scheduled/backfill execution path is implemented for strict 7-day window progression or live-ingestion coexistence behavior at runtime.

The handoff commitId (47ddaf6e...) modifies SwitcherDashboardUITests project membership, not backfill cursor/window implementation or BackfillSchedulerTests wiring required by this feature. The review diff for the provided commit is unrelated, so the feature handoff is not traceable/auditable against its stated implementation scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff sets skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, but the required context-read evidence from token-accounting-worker SKILL.md is missing from verification.commandsRun.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff 2026-04-09T13-28-28-107Z... lists only xcodebuild test command(s); no command output evidence of reading mission.md/AGENTS.md/.factory/library/architecture.md/.factory/library/user-testing.md as required by SKILL.md step 1 and Handoff Discipline requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture guidance appears stale/misaligned for this mission domain, which can mislead workers doing token-accounting features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md is entirely focused on multi-account switcher architecture (browser/CLI profile switching) and does not describe token-accounting/backfill/reconciliation flows used in this milestone.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, and git diffs for m4-backfill-window-and-live-ingestion-coexistence. Marked fail due to missing production wiring for backfill execution semantics and because the provided handoff commit is unrelated to the feature scope, breaking traceable verification.
